items.title: Hollander POTD Eric Williams. NJ HS star went to Providence then drafted 14th by BOS in 95. Tweener who was small but could bang in post. Traded to DEN in 97+ had 19 ppg before season ended after 4 gms. After was solid vet w/BOS (again), TOR + elsewhere thru 2007 (age 34).
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Eric Williams. NJ HS star went to Providence then drafted 14th by BOS in 95. Tweener who was small but could bang in post. Traded to DEN in 97+ had 19 ppg before season ended after 4 gms. After was solid vet w/BOS (again), TOR + elsewhere thru 2007 (age 34).

items.author: Joe Freeman
items.body_excerpt:
Former @beaverbaseball.osubeavers.com walk-on Wade Meckler makes MLB comeback with hometown Angels:

"I’ll occasionally catch myself. I’ll look down at my jersey and it’s like, ‘Wow. I’m playing for the Angels.’ I used to wear this jersey in Little League."

www.oregonlive.com/beavers/2026...

media.title: Former Beavers walk-on Wade Meckler makes inspiring MLB comeback with Angels
media.description: Six days before Christmas, the Giants gave up on Wade Meckler. Now the former OSU star is hitting .307 for the Angels, the team he grew up watching from the stands just 10 miles from his high school.
